acceptance_criteria: Terminal states (Done, Cancelled) cannot transition backward without explicit reopen
InProgress requires Ready or Backlog as prior state
Paused flag clears when task leaves Blocked/OnHold status
Automated test coverage for all valid and invalid transitions
description: Task status transitions have no validation — any state can move to any other. The paused flag has a bug where it persists after unblocking. Implement proper task state machine with transition rules and fix the paused flag inconsistency.
title: Enforce task lifecycle correctness and state machine guardrails
